repos.description: A collection of examples that show how to use CrewAI framework to automate workflows.

antipatterns.name: Unprotected HTTP call (no retry)
antipatterns.description: External API call with no retry/backoff — one transient failure kills the workflow

antipatterns.name: Bare except / empty catch
antipatterns.description: Swallows all errors silently — agent has no idea something failed

antipatterns.name: Hardcoded single model
antipatterns.description: Locked to one LLM model with no fallback — outage = total downtime

antipatterns.name: No structured error response
antipatterns.description: API errors returned as plain strings instead of structured JSON — agents can't parse recovery steps
antipatterns.exampleLine: return "Error: IDs must be provided as a list"
